_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to ensure collected data is transferred to the appropriate storage locations.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data storage technologies, including columnar storage formats (Parquet, ORC), transactional databases, NoSQL stores, object storage, and their appropriate use cases.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-K-020 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-006 (RC, cosine: 0.541), SP-T-002 (SP, cosine: 0.537).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.403). Shared vocabulary: [appropriate, data, storage]. DCWF-only terms [ability, collected, ensure, locations, transferred] vs WIDAI-only terms [cases, columnar, databases, formats, knowledge, nosql] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.891, R=0.842). P exceeds R by 0.048 — the DCWF element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Ability to ensure collected data is transferred to the appropriate storage locat" and "Knowledge of data storage technologies, including columnar storage formats (Parq" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.601 > STS 0.403 (gap +0.199). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [appropriate, data, storage] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.7%. Shared tokens: [appropriate, data, storage]. DCWF-only: [ability, collected, ensure, locations, transferred]. WIDAI-only: [cases, columnar, databases, formats, knowledge, nosql].
